# StardewPriceDB

StardewPriceDB is a fan-made Stardew Valley price database and profit calculator for English-speaking players. It covers item sell prices, crop profitability, Keg and Preserves Jar processing values, fishing locations, villager gifts, recipes, bundles, and strategy guides.

Canonical site: https://stardewpricedb.com/
Sitemap: https://stardewpricedb.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://stardewpricedb.com/robots.txt

## Primary Sections

- Item prices and profit pages: https://stardewpricedb.com/
- Fishing guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/fishing/
- Recipes: https://stardewpricedb.com/recipes/
- Bundles: https://stardewpricedb.com/bundles/
- Gift guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/gifts/
- Strategy guides: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/
- Profit calculator: https://stardewpricedb.com/calculator/spring/

## Representative Guides

- Most profitable crops: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/most-profitable-crops/
- Best crops by season: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-crops-by-season/
- Best Spring crops: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-spring-crops/
- Best Summer crops: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-summer-crops/
- Best Fall crops: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-fall-crops/
- Best Greenhouse crops: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-greenhouse-crops/
- Ancient Fruit vs Starfruit: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/ancient-fruit-vs-starfruit/
- Ancient Fruit Wine guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/ancient-fruit-wine/
- Starfruit Wine guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/starfruit-wine/
- Truffle Oil guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/truffle-oil/
- Caviar guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/caviar/
- Best Fish by Season: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-fish-by-season/
- Best Keg items: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-keg-items/
- Best Preserves Jar items: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-preserves-jar-items/
- Keg vs Preserves Jar: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/keg-vs-jar/
- Ancient Fruit guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/ancient-fruit/
- Community Center guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/community-center/
- Best gifts guide: https://stardewpricedb.com/guide/best-gifts/

## Data Notes

- Game data version: Stardew Valley 1.6.15
- Last verification: 2026-05-08
- Data sources: Stardew Valley game data, Stardew Valley Wiki, and in-game formula checks.
- Stardew Valley is created by ConcernedApe. StardewPriceDB is not affiliated with or endorsed by ConcernedApe.
